deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash transaction. Contract March 12. Lien blocker resolved April 21. Cleared and funded April 26. Officially closed April 27.
deals.next: Post-close follow-up pending: joy gift delivery, thank Sam VanDenheuvel, thank you basket for Michael and UPS Store staff, thank Chelsey Bongiovi

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Transaction confirmed complete.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Chicago Title underwriting confirmed: release required or 45-day wait.
Contract executed. Sale price $152,000 cash.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac (Steven Jimenez)
deals.notes: Land sale, 20 acres, hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. Clearing complete. First offer stalled (Michael Rodriguez, RBFCU). New prospect interested in subdividing.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as clearing wraps. Lead with net after close on next offer. Keep Lauren in the loop as TC.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. Price reduced to $117,500. MLS updated.
New prospect lady reached out wanting to show. Interested in subdividing or alternate use.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer dead - Michael Rodriguez stalled, no earnest money.
Current offer basically dead. Steve clearing property. Key message: net after close matters most.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Work in progress: cleanup active, drywall cut for utilities. Medina Electric and East Medina County SUD confirmed. Listing agreement needed to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application for new meter. Follow up with EMCSUD on water service. Send listing agreement to Priority Bank. Coordinate utility setup with contractor.

logs.m: Cleanup active, floor demo complete, drywall cut for electrician and plumber. Utilities confirmed.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). Work active and moving.
Met Matt Toney. Connected directly with Jerry Sadler. Work target: start by Monday.
Two estimates received and compared. HouzzPro ($54,877) vs T&T Construction ($61,980).

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan $486,406 balance (~$493K payoff). Market value $350-400K. Underwater by $93-143K. Vacant 6 months. Double-carrying costs ~$5,300-6,000/month.
deals.next: Call broker first. Then present three paths to sellers: short sale, VA assumption by investor, or price reduction with cash to close. Get Newrez short sale packet if Path A chosen.

logs.m: Call completed 11am. Chandler laid off - strong hardship for short sale. Leaning toward short sale path. Short sale client email drafted.
Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis presented. Three options laid out. Payoff confirmed at $489,501 as of March 13.
Stopped by property. Put mail in house. Landscaper stopping by to cut yard.
Full market analysis: realistic value $350-400K. 717 Jack Nicklaus just listed at $519K makes current $528,999 indefensible.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA home in Laura Heights PUD. Referral from Isaac Linares. Seller relocating to NC second week of June. Insurance claim roof replacement in progress. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
deals.next: Monitor showings and offers. Roof completion pending insurance adjuster decision. Communicate updates to buyers and agents. Follow up with Jose and Katy on any investor offers.

logs.m: Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30 PM.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing feedback: cultural concern, some furniture negotiable.
Insurance adjuster out May 11. Claim moving forward. New roof incoming.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage, development potential. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer). Title defect: incomplete legal description in deed. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Discuss Isaac formal offer once details confirmed. Fix title defect with Correction Deed. Follow up with Josh LT on potential partnership with Isaac development project.

logs.m: Price adjustment conversation needed. Isaac expanding concept to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner - connect Isaac and Josh.
Jennifer Ball (co-owner) took initiative: title defect found. Deed has incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins to prepare Correction Deed.
Discussed Isaac development interest with sisters. They were enthusiastic about mobile home development concept. ~$150K offer contingent on project moving forward.
Showing occurred. Sisters expressed desire to end listing after March.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Brand new 2025 Lennar home in Grace Gardens. 3BR/2BA. Rental listing prep. Rent $1,595/month. All lease terms confirmed. Vinyl signs needed today. Photos priority.
deals.next: Get photos (professional or existing). Drop sign with QR code today. Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope. Set up Linktree listing link. Contact property management if needed.

logs.m: Photos identified as priority before listing goes live. Sign drop today. New logo/rider signs pending from Opie.
All listing agreement questions answered by Jimbo. Rent $1,595, 12-month lease, full month co-op commission confirmed.
Jimbo replied to all questions. CMA analysis: $1,595 matches only direct comp on same street.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. His son made flyers. Need to review.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA on 4.05 acres. Frio County. Divorce situation. Payoff ~$257K (as of May). Market value $275-315K. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles. Sellers need minimum $285-290K to walk with proceeds.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Schedule professional photos. Confirm acreage on site. Discuss Colton contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751. Get listing agreement signed. Recommend $295K starting price.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb. CMA pulled - thin market. Built listing presentation with net sheet.
Prior clients. Helped with original VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Landlord selling duplex, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA requirement. Rate buydowns and incentives being explored.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach Schaphorst. Set up new construction search platform. Identify builders with no HOA. Keep momentum high - rental clock ticking.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing. Hoping they engage.
Text from Mike: rental selling, rents going up. 916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, pass. Chris introduced new construction idea. They were open.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Active military wife. Recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting in San Antonio area. Looking to purchase. Met at 181 CR 7751 work site May 11.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property. Understand financing and work scope.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection from Little Red House. Grief to healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration and real estate opportunity long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story. Keep nurturing - no rush on real estate.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: 13810 Tangle Tree St. Plans to sell soon. Property 90% complete but having trouble finishing. Already working with realtor. Open to selling as-is or finishing.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. Stay connected through garden community. Position for future relationship.

priorities.title: 340 Sollock - Broker Call & Seller Conversation
priorities.sub: Get path decision from sellers on short sale vs assumption vs cash to close
priorities.notes: Sellers leaning short sale. Chandler laid off - strong hardship for Newrez. Call broker first for protocol, then present three clear paths to Matt and Chandler. Get Newrez packet ready if Path A confirmed.

followUps.text: Call broker for short sale protocol and guidance
Call Matt and Chandler - present three paths clearly
Start Newrez short sale packet if Path A chosen

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 - Listing Agreement to Priority Bank
priorities.sub: Send listing paperwork to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham immediately
priorities.notes: Cleanup active and progressing. Must send listing agreement to Priority Bank decision-makers while work is underway. Get scope of work finalized and pricing ready.

followUps.text: Send to Jerry Sadler and ray.stidham@prioritybank.com
Confirm work completion timeline with Matt Toney

priorities.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Photos & Sign Drop Today
priorities.sub: Get rental listing live with photos and sign on property
priorities.notes: Photos are blocking the listing from going live. Drop sign with QR code today. Order vinyl signs from Opie for swap. Set up Linktree landing page.

followUps.text: Get professional photos or use existing ones
Drop sign and lockbox on property today
Order vinyl signs from Opie - large branded with flower

priorities.sub: Get updated payoff, photos scheduled, listing agreement signed
priorities.notes: Met May 15. Thin market (3 comps only). Recommend $295K starting price. Need updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Professional photos essential.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender

priorities.notes: Buyer rep sent but not yet signed by Milagros (Brandon mom). Must register Chris as her agent at first builder visit - this is critical for commission. Pull new construction inventory across multiple builders. Budget $50K down, ~$1000/month payment target.

Pull new construction inventory from 5+ builders
